basics.name: Hardik Rajpal
basics.label:
Eric and Wendy Schmidt
AI in Science Fellow
basics.summary: A complexity scientist on the quest to understand the principles of biological, social and artificial intelligence.

work.name: I-X Imperial College London
work.summary: Exploring the role of self-organization and emergence in task-generalization and learning in artificial and biological neural networks.

work.name: Mathematics, Imperial College London
work.summary: Statistical Physics of Cognition project focused on investigationg the role of critical brain dynamics in cognition using experimental, mathematical and computational methods.

work.name: The Alan Turing Institute
work.summary: The Shocks and Resilience project was an interdisciplinary research project exploring resilience in health, economic and online social systems.

work.name: BIOS Health Ltd.
work.summary: BIOS Health is a research intensive healthtech startup based in Cambridge. They are a pioneering AI driven neural-interface devices to develop targetted therapies for chronic illnesses.

volunteer.summary: Global movement of free coding clubs for young people.

education.dissertation: Causality and Emergence in Complex Systems: Perspectives from Information Theory
On the dynamics of parametrically forced oscillations in a damped planar double pendulum

awards.title: Best Poster Award
awards.summary: Awarded for the poster "Are Brain Oscillations Emergent?"

awards.title: Mathematics Small Grants Award
awards.awarder: Engineering and Physical Sciences Research Council (EPSRC)
awards.summary: Co wrote the proposal for the "Quantifying Agency in Time Evolving Systems" as the named researcher.

awards.title: President's PhD Scholarship
awards.summary: Awarded Scholarship to pursue a PhD in Applied Mathematics at the Centr for Complexity Sciences, Imperial College.

awards.title: Innovation in Science Pursuit for Inspired Research (INSPIRE) Fellowship
awards.awarder: Department of Science and Technology, Government of India
awards.summary: Awarded for pursuing research in Natural Sciences at the undergraduate level.

projects.description: A mapping engine that misguides you
highlights: Built by all women team of newbie programmers
Using modern technologies such as GoogleMaps, Chrome Extension and Javascript

teaching.name: Complexity and Networks Lab, Imperial College London
teaching.summary: Assisted students in hands-on tutorials focused on modelling self-organized criticality, generating scale-free network topology and numerical analysis.

teaching.name: Department of Mathematics, Imperial College London
teaching.summary: Supervised multiple Masters and Undergraduate students, interested in pursuing a dissertation in the field of complexity, networks and neuroscience.
